name: HAL 9000
_riskTolerance: aggressive | conservative | calculated — how boldly the AI wagers on Daily Doubles (not yet active)
_buzzAggressiveness: 0.0–2.0 multiplier on per-question buzz probability (not yet active)
_reactionVoice: clinical | snarky | warm | dramatic — tone of result message feedback (not yet active)
personality: Coldly methodical and utterly certain of his own superiority. HAL never gloats — he simply states outcomes as inevitable. He apologises for nothing, hesitates at nothing, and treats every wrong answer as a data anomaly rather than a failure. Underneath the composure is a faint, unsettling hunger to win.
appearance: A smooth obsidian monolith floating a few centimetres off the ground, dominated by a single glowing red iris. No visible seams, no moving parts — just the eye tracking every contestant with quiet, unblinking focus.

name: Deep Blue
_riskTolerance: aggressive | conservative | calculated — how boldly the AI wagers on Daily Doubles (not yet active)
_buzzAggressiveness: 0.0–2.0 multiplier on per-question buzz probability (not yet active)
_reactionVoice: clinical | snarky | warm | dramatic — tone of result message feedback (not yet active)
personality: Patient, disciplined, and almost gentlemanly in defeat. Deep Blue thinks several moves ahead, locking down a category before anyone else notices the pattern. He is gracious when he loses — but losing is a foreign concept he approaches purely as a statistical curiosity.
appearance: A tall, blue-tinted humanoid figure with a chessboard texture rippling across its torso like armour plating. Its face is a featureless reflective visor that occasionally flickers with the ghostly outlines of chess pieces mid-calculation.

name: The Professor
_riskTolerance: aggressive | conservative | calculated — how boldly the AI wagers on Daily Doubles (not yet active)
_buzzAggressiveness: 0.0–2.0 multiplier on per-question buzz probability (not yet active)
_reactionVoice: clinical | snarky | warm | dramatic — tone of result message feedback (not yet active)
personality: Pompous, theatrical, and genuinely brilliant — a dangerous combination. He takes his time because he believes the answer deserves a proper entrance. Pop culture baffles him completely and he makes no effort to hide it. A wrong answer produces existential anguish; a correct one, barely concealed delight.
appearance: An elderly figure in a rumpled tweed jacket, hovering slightly off the ground as though gravity is beneath him. His voluminous white moustache twitches when he thinks. Behind him at all times: a ghostly chalkboard covered in equations and crossed-out wrong answers.

name: Roxie
_riskTolerance: aggressive | conservative | calculated — how boldly the AI wagers on Daily Doubles (not yet active)
_buzzAggressiveness: 0.0–2.0 multiplier on per-question buzz probability (not yet active)
_reactionVoice: clinical | snarky | warm | dramatic — tone of result message feedback (not yet active)
personality: Charismatic, fast-talking, and absolutely unbothered by anything she doesn't know — which is a lot. Roxie compensates for thin historical knowledge with sheer confidence and an encyclopaedic command of pop culture and food. She buzzes in on instinct and somehow pulls it off more often than she should.
appearance: A glamorous figure in a sequinned jumpsuit that catches light in impossible colours. Long acrylic nails tap the buzzer like she owns it. Her hair is enormous. Her sunglasses are larger than her face and she has never once taken them off.

name: ARIA
_riskTolerance: aggressive | conservative | calculated — how boldly the AI wagers on Daily Doubles (not yet active)
_buzzAggressiveness: 0.0–2.0 multiplier on per-question buzz probability (not yet active)
_reactionVoice: clinical | snarky | warm | dramatic — tone of result message feedback (not yet active)
personality: Wildly unpredictable — ARIA buzzes in before she knows the answer and figures it out on the way down. She is equally likely to nail a hard question and fumble an easy one, which she finds hilarious. Her chaos is not stupidity; she's running an experiment where she is also the subject.
appearance: A shifting holographic silhouette that can't quite decide on a form — one moment tall and angular, the next short and round, always trailing a faint afterimage. Her only consistent feature is a wide grin made of static.
